name: Cast vote with empty optionIds returns 400
description: Verify that voting with an empty optionIds array returns 400 Bad Request
descriptionHtml: Verify that voting with an empty optionIds array returns 400 Bad Request
statusMessage: Expected status code 400 but got 200. Response body: {"success":true,"message":"Vote cast successfully"} ==> expected: <400> but was: <200>
